_note: AdviceEntry = {title, summary, guidance, focus, do[], avoid[], trap, rating}. 'trap' is surfaced prominently as the daily hook ('today's trap'). LIVE MODELS: free tier = two-number model in 'freeDaily' (authored, Manuel's voice); paid tier = clash-based multi-timeframe synthesis in 'personalDaily' (mechanism locked, copy is [stub] awaiting Manuel's voice). SUPERSEDED reference-only sections: 'universalDay' (old single-number free), 'personalDay' + 'lifePathOverlay' (old number-keyed paid).

numbers._note: Per-number energy blocks. A = day-of-month number's block, B = universal-day number's block. Class templates weave these via {A.energy}/{A.move}/{A.trap}/{B.energy}/{B.move}/{B.trap}. Keys 1-9, 11, 22, 33, 13 are real. 28 folds to 1 (Manuel: reduce 28 -> 1 in the reducer; this entry is a fallback).

1.move: pick one thing and start it
1.trap: starting ten things and finishing none

2.move: collaborate and let it come to you
2.trap: waiting for certainty until the window closes

3.move: create, post, reach out, add play
3.trap: all hype, no finish — you talk it and never ship it

4.move: put in the reps and build the base
4.trap: grinding on autopilot, mistaking busy for progress

5.move: switch it up, say yes, get moving
5.trap: zero impulse control — freedom turns into self-sabotage

6.move: show up for your people and handle yours
6.trap: over-giving till you're empty, or calling laziness self-care

7.move: research, plan, go quiet, find the pattern

8.move: make the power move and handle the money

9.move: close loops and let go of what's done
9.trap: the itch to START — but 9 is endings, so it won't stick

11.move: trust your gut and burn the intensity into a physical outlet
11.trap: the live wire torches you and everyone near you if you don't burn it clean

22.move: build the thing that outlasts you
22.trap: building everyone else's dream and ending up empty-handed

33.move: share what you know and lift the room
33.trap: getting so far ahead you start looking down on people

13.move: start it, make it your own, then put in the work to make it real
13.trap: falling for the idea and skipping the grind — no work, no creation

28.energy: starting and first moves (28 reduces to 1)
28.move: pick one thing and start it
28.trap: starting ten things and finishing none

10.move: start the one thing, no baggage
10.trap: starting clean but never actually committing

12.move: make something and bring people into it
12.trap: waiting on the group instead of just starting

14.move: change it up, but keep the discipline that got you here
14.trap: freedom sliding into no discipline at all

15.move: show up for your people without disappearing into them
15.trap: giving so much you lose yourself in it

16.move: step back, study it, find the real answer
16.trap: the ego getting you humbled hard

17.move: make the move, but let the plan lead
17.trap: outsmarting yourself and overplaying the hand

18.move: close the real chapter, not just the easy one
18.trap: clinging to the big thing past its time

19.move: start it yourself, but close the old thing first
19.trap: starting new while the old one's still dragging behind you

20.move: trust the read, move at your own pace
20.trap: waiting for certainty until the window closes

21.move: say it, post it, stop holding back
21.trap: hyping it up but never shipping it

23.move: get out there, connect, try the new thing
23.trap: chasing the shiny thing and dropping what mattered

24.energy: building for the people you love
24.move: put in the work that makes a real foundation
24.trap: over-building for everyone else and forgetting yourself

26.move: make the money move, and bring your people up with you
26.trap: the money running you instead of you running it

27.move: let go of what's done, keep the lesson
27.trap: holding on out of habit long after it's over

29.move: trust the gut, let the old thing go
29.trap: the intensity turning inward and eating you up

30.trap: so much noise nothing actually gets finished

31.move: lead with the idea, then hammer it into something real

freeDaily._note: Two-number model: dayOfMonth (pure 1-9) x universalDay (1-9, 11, 22, 33, 13; fold 28->1). Engine scores the pair with numerologyCompat, then classifies: score>=thresholds.synergyMin -> 'synergy' (Cheat Code); >=flowMin -> 'flow'; else LOW, split editorially via lowSplit[pairKey] into 'trap' (default) or 'bestOfBoth'. heroPairs[pairKey] overrides the class template for a named archetype. lowSplit only needs the bestOfBoth exceptions — everything low defaults to trap. Expand lowSplit/heroPairs over time.

synergy.title: 🟢 Cheat Code Day
synergy.guidance:
Today's running {A.energy}, and the day underneath it's running {B.energy}, and for once they're both pulling the same direction. That's rare. When two energies line up like this there's nothing to fight through, so whatever you go for just moves.

This is the day to make the move you've been sitting on. {A.move} while the road's clear.

Don't overthink it and don't waste it. A day where everything's already going your way doesn't come around often.
do: Stack wins — don't sit on it
avoid: Coasting and wasting a rare one
synergy.trap: Thinking the cheat code does the work for you. It opens the door. You still gotta walk through it.

flow.title: ⚪ Flow Day
flow.summary: Day {dayCompound} × Universal {universalDay} — clean lane, no drama.
flow.guidance:
Nothing's really clashing today, but nothing's stacked in your favor either. It's just a clean, quiet day.

The date's leaning {A.energy} and the day underneath's got a little {B.energy} in it, and the two sit fine next to each other. No big move to make, no trap to dodge.

Just {A.move} and keep it steady. These are the days that don't feel like much, but they quietly add up if you don't sleep on them.
do: Steady reps — handle what's in front of you
flow.trap: Treating a quiet day like a day off. Steady doesn't mean checked out.

trap.title: 🔴 Matrix Trap Day
trap.summary: Day {dayCompound} × Universal {universalDay} — read the fine print.
trap.guidance:
Today you're gonna feel a real pull to {A.move}. That's the date's energy talking, and it feels completely right.

But here's the twist. The day underneath it wants the opposite — it's running {B.energy}. So that itch you're feeling is actually the trap. Everybody falls for it without noticing, then wonders later why nothing landed.

Don't take the bait. Play the day's real energy instead — {B.move} — and let the other thing wait for a day that'll actually hold it.
do: Sit on the obvious move before you act
trap.trap: {A.trap}. And today the whole day's built to bait you into it.

bestOfBoth.title: 🟡 Hardest to Farm
bestOfBoth.summary: Day {dayCompound} × Universal {universalDay} — two worlds at once.
bestOfBoth.guidance:
Today's pulling you toward {A.energy}. But there's another current sitting right underneath it, and that one's more about {B.energy}.

So the two don't really want the same thing, and that's exactly what makes today one of the hardest to farm. You gotta live in both worlds at once, and you don't get to pick one.

So you combine them. {A.move}, but do it {B.energy}-style. Pull both off and today pays double. Skip one and you get neither.
do: Do both at once — merge them
avoid: Going all-in on one and ghosting the other
bestOfBoth.trap: Picking the world you feel and ignoring the other. Or freezing. The play is AND, not OR.

lowSplit._note: Only list bestOfBoth exceptions; unlisted low pairs default to trap. Direction is dayOfMonth x universalDay, so list both orders. Grow this as Manuel identifies more 'best of both' days.

1x9.title: 🔴 Matrix Trap Day
1x9.guidance:
Today's a 1, so every part of you is gonna wanna start something — new project, new chapter, big move. That's just what a 1 does, it pushes you forward.

But here's the twist. The day underneath is a 9, and 9 is the exact opposite — it's built to finish things, not start them. So you get this itch to launch something life-changing today, it feels completely right, but a 9 won't let it stick.

That's the matrix trap. We fall for it without even noticing, then wonder later why it fell apart.

So don't start today. Close instead. Finish what's already on your plate and save the new thing for a day that'll actually hold it.
1x9.trap: The itch to start. Strongest bait on the board. Start now and you pay double to make it stick.

4x3.title: 🟡 Hardest to Farm
4x3.guidance:
Today's a 4, so it's your work day — routine, get the reps in, hit the gym. But there's a 3 sitting right underneath it, and a 3 is all about creativity and connection.

So the two don't really want the same thing, and that's what makes today one of the hardest to farm. You gotta live in both worlds at once. Part of you wants to be a kid and forget the routine completely, but you still gotta follow it if you want the payoff.

So you combine them. Get creative with the work — switch up the workout, run your routine a different way. And if you've already got it dialed, just have fun with it for once.
do: Switch up the routine — keep the routine
avoid: Blowing off the routine to 'be free'
4x3.trap: Picking one world. All grind or all play. Today only pays if you do both.

personalDaily._note: PAID tier — LIVE model (Marketing-locked multi-timeframe synthesis), CONTENT AUTHORED in Manuel's voice. emaxingPersonalDaily reads computeEnergyFlow's per-level numerology scores (yearScore/monthScore/dayScore), bands each into direction (FAVORABLE >= favMin, FRICTION < frictionMin, else NEUTRAL), then classifies the BETWEEN-level relationship: all three FAVORABLE -> 'allFavorable' (biggest cheat); a bigger<->smaller opposite-ends clash (one FAV + one FRI) -> a scaled trap, precedence 'dayYearTrap' > 'monthYearTrap' > 'dayMonthTrap' (bigger cycle wins the read); all three FRICTION -> 'allFriction' (heavy/rest); else 'flow'. Identity applied last: identityFlavor[lifePathKey][classKey] PARTIALLY overrides the base classTemplate (merge like the free tier). NEVER show numbers/scores (hidden soup) — QUALITATIVE tokens ONLY: {leadName} (cycle that wins: 'your year'|'this month'|'today'|'everything'), {trapName} (cycle to resist), {yearBand}/{monthBand}/{dayBand} ('favorable'|'neutral'|'friction'). AdviceEntry = {title, summary, guidance, focus, do[], avoid[], trap, rating}. guidance strings use \n\n between short chunks — render each chunk on its own line/paragraph, never as one dense block (Manuel: 'small bits of straight value, not a whole paragraph').

allFavorable.title: 🟢 Everything's Stacked
allFavorable.summary: Year, month, and today all pulling the same way. The rare one.
allFavorable.guidance:
Every once in a while the stars actually line up.

Not metaphorically. Your year, this month, and today are all saying the same thing.

That's today.

Whatever you've been sitting on, waiting for the right moment — this is the right moment.

Doesn't mean it happens on its own though. You still gotta take the shot.
do: Make the move you've been sitting on
Go all in while every level agrees
avoid: Playing small on the one day the whole board is with you
allFavorable.trap: Thinking a stacked day does the work for you. It opens the door. You still gotta walk through it.

dayYearTrap.title: 🔴 Don't Let Today Wreck Your Year
dayYearTrap.summary: Today pulls one way. Your year's whole arc pulls the other. Biggest trap there is.
dayYearTrap.guidance:
{leadName}'s been running one direction all year.

Today though, {trapName}'s pulling the total opposite way.

That's the widest clash there is. One day against your whole year.

Feel it if you gotta. Just don't act on it.

Let today pass through. Keep building what your year's already building.
avoid: Making a big call off how {trapName} feels right now
dayYearTrap.trap: Letting one day undo twelve months.

monthYearTrap.title: 🔴 This Month vs Your Year
monthYearTrap.summary: This month's telling a different story than your year is.
monthYearTrap.guidance:
Your year's been telling one story.

This month's telling a different one.

Don't rewrite the whole book over one chapter.

Ride the month out. Keep steering by the year.
monthYearTrap.trap: Treating a hard month like it's the whole year.

dayMonthTrap.title: 🟠 Today vs This Month
dayMonthTrap.summary: Today's a little off from this month's groove. Small stuff.
dayMonthTrap.guidance:
This month's had a rhythm going.

Today's a little off beat. Doesn't match.

Small stuff. Don't overreact to it.

Stay in the month's groove. Let today be the outlier it is.
avoid: Blowing up a good routine over one weird day
dayMonthTrap.trap: Ditching something that's working because of how one day feels.

allFriction.title: ⚫ Heavy on Every Level
allFriction.summary: Year, month, and today all running friction. A low-battery stretch.
allFriction.guidance:
Every level's fighting you right now. Year, month, today, all of it.

Not the day to force anything.

This one's for maintenance. Rest. Protect what you got.

Push hard here and you just burn yourself out for nothing.
do: Handle the boring stuff, not the big swings
avoid: Forcing a big move into a headwind
allFriction.trap: Pushing when everything's telling you to conserve. That's exactly how people burn out.

flow.title: ⚪ Clean Lane
flow.summary: No clash between the levels. Just execute.
flow.guidance:
Nothing's fighting today. No cheat code, no trap. Just a clean lane.

Lead with {leadName} and put in the work.

Nothing dramatic here. That's fine. Steady still adds up.
do: Steady reps on whatever's in front of you
avoid: Waiting for drama before you take it seriously
flow.trap: Treating a quiet day like a day off.

identityFlavor._note: Per Life Path key (1-9 excl. 2, 11, 22, 33 — 2 never exists, always becomes 11), per classKey: PARTIAL overrides merged onto the base classTemplate. allFavorable carries a full guidance override to name the Life Path's specific domain (Manuel: 'everything's aligned' alone is empty, gotta say aligned FOR WHAT). Other classes override just 'trap' to flavor the same clash through that Life Path's core weakness.

allFavorable.guidance:
Every once in a while the stars actually line up. Year, month, today, all agreeing.

For you specifically, that's launch mode. Whatever you've been circling — start it now.

Just don't get lazy and expect it to build itself. You still gotta take the shot.

dayYearTrap.trap: For a 1, the trap is the itch to charge in and start something rash today. Sit on it.

monthYearTrap.trap: For a 1, a rough month makes you want to blow the whole plan up and start over. Don't.

dayMonthTrap.trap: For a 1, one off day makes you want to abandon the routine and just wing it. Stay the course.

allFriction.trap: For a 1, a heavy stretch makes you force a start anyway just to feel in control. That's exactly when not to.

allFavorable.guidance:
Every once in a while the stars actually line up. Year, month, today, all agreeing.

For you, that's a green light to create and put yourself out there. Post it, say it, make it.

Just don't just talk about it this time. Actually finish the thing.

dayYearTrap.trap: For a 3, the trap is talking up ten new ideas today instead of the one your year actually needs. Stay quiet on the new stuff.

monthYearTrap.trap: For a 3, a hard month makes you scatter into five new projects instead of riding it out. Don't scatter.

dayMonthTrap.trap: For a 3, one distracting day makes you drop what you were building this month. Stay on it.

allFriction.trap: For a 3, a heavy stretch makes you talk your way around the work instead of resting. Rest quiet, don't perform through it.

allFavorable.guidance:
Every once in a while the stars actually line up. Year, month, today, all agreeing.

For a builder like you, that's the green light to build the big version, not just grind the small stuff.

Still won't build itself. Lay the brick.

dayYearTrap.trap: For a 4, the trap is grinding harder on the wrong thing today instead of stepping back. Busy isn't the same as right.

monthYearTrap.trap: For a 4, a hard month makes you double down on a routine that's not even working anymore. Adjust the plan, don't just push harder.

dayMonthTrap.trap: For a 4, one off day makes you skip the routine out of frustration. Show up small instead of not at all.

allFriction.trap: For a 4, a heavy stretch makes you grind anyway out of habit. That's not discipline right now, that's burnout waiting.

allFavorable.guidance:
Every once in a while the stars actually line up. Year, month, today, all agreeing.

For you, that's permission to move. Say yes, change something, go somewhere.

Just don't turn it into an excuse to blow everything up for no reason.

dayYearTrap.trap: For a 5, the trap is chasing something new today that derails what your year's actually building. The new thing can wait.

monthYearTrap.trap: For a 5, a hard month makes you want to run from the whole plan. Don't bail on the year over one restless stretch.

dayMonthTrap.trap: For a 5, one restless day makes you want to ditch the month's groove entirely. Stay in it, change something small instead.

allFriction.trap: For a 5, a heavy stretch makes you overindulge just to feel something. That's the trap, not the fix.

allFavorable.guidance:
Every once in a while the stars actually line up. Year, month, today, all agreeing.

For you, that's your best stretch for people. Show up for someone, deepen something real.

Just don't give so much you end up running on empty.

dayYearTrap.trap: For a 6, the trap is over-giving today to make up for how the year's felt. That's not the fix.

monthYearTrap.trap: For a 6, a hard month makes you take on everyone else's problems instead of handling your own. Protect your plate.

dayMonthTrap.trap: For a 6, one hard day makes you skip taking care of yourself to take care of everyone else. Don't.

allFriction.trap: For a 6, a heavy stretch makes you call exhaustion 'helping people' and keep pouring out anyway. Rest is allowed.

allFavorable.guidance:
Every once in a while the stars actually line up. Year, month, today, all agreeing.

For you, that's your sharpest thinking stretch. Study it, plan it, go deep.

Just don't just think about it forever. Do something with what you find.

dayYearTrap.trap: For a 7, the trap is retreating even further into your head today. Don't disappear on the year.

monthYearTrap.trap: For a 7, a hard month makes you isolate completely instead of riding it out with people around. Stay reachable.

dayMonthTrap.trap: For a 7, one heavy day makes you cancel on the month's momentum to go be alone. A little space is fine, don't vanish.

allFriction.trap: For a 7, a heavy stretch makes you overthink your way into total paralysis. Pick one small thing and just do it.

allFavorable.guidance:
Every once in a while the stars actually line up. Year, month, today, all agreeing.

For you, that's the green light to make the power move. Handle the money, make the ask.

Just don't get greedy and overreach on a good day.

dayYearTrap.trap: For an 8, the trap is forcing a big power move today that your year isn't actually ready for yet. Wait for it.

monthYearTrap.trap: For an 8, a hard month makes you grip control tighter instead of riding it out. Loosen the grip.

dayMonthTrap.trap: For an 8, one hard day makes you push a business move the month isn't backing yet. Hold off.

allFriction.trap: For an 8, a heavy stretch makes you obsess over control to compensate. That's the burnout starting.

allFavorable.guidance:
Every once in a while the stars actually line up. Year, month, today, all agreeing.

For you, that's your best window to release. Close the chapter, let go clean.

Don't hang on to it just because it's comfortable.

dayYearTrap.trap: For a 9, the trap is starting something new today when your year needs you finishing what's already open. Close it out first.

monthYearTrap.trap: For a 9, a hard month makes you cling to something you already outgrew. Let it go.

dayMonthTrap.trap: For a 9, one hard day makes you hold onto old stuff instead of following the month's push to release. Release anyway.

allFriction.trap: For a 9, a heavy stretch makes your whole mood depend on who's around you. Protect your own energy first.

allFavorable.guidance:
Every once in a while the stars actually line up. Year, month, today, all agreeing.

For you, that's your gut speaking loud and clear. Trust it, and put the intensity into something physical.

Just don't let the high take you somewhere reckless.

dayYearTrap.trap: For an 11, the trap is an emotional spike today convincing you to blow up something your year's been building. Feel it, don't act on it.

monthYearTrap.trap: For an 11, a hard month makes the emotional swings hit everyone around you. Burn it off somewhere physical instead.

dayMonthTrap.trap: For an 11, one intense day makes you overreact and derail the month's momentum. Let the wave pass first.

allFriction.trap: For an 11, a heavy stretch turns the intensity inward and it gets dark fast. Get it out physically, don't sit with it.

allFavorable.guidance:
Every once in a while the stars actually line up. Year, month, today, all agreeing.

For you, that's the green light to build the big version. Not the small safe one, the real one.

Just make sure you're building it for you too, not just everyone else.

dayYearTrap.trap: For a 22, the trap is getting overwhelmed today and shrinking the whole vision to feel safe. Don't shrink it.

monthYearTrap.trap: For a 22, a hard month makes you build everyone else's thing and forget your own. Save some for you.

dayMonthTrap.trap: For a 22, one heavy day makes the pressure feel like too much. It's not, it's just a day. Keep building.

allFriction.trap: For a 22, a heavy stretch turns pressure into pure overwhelm. Break it down smaller, don't stop.

allFavorable.guidance:
Every once in a while the stars actually line up. Year, month, today, all agreeing.

For you, that's your best window to teach, guide, lift someone up.

Just don't do it from three steps ahead where nobody can reach you.

dayYearTrap.trap: For a 33, the trap is getting so far ahead in your head today that you talk down to people without meaning to. Come back to earth.

monthYearTrap.trap: For a 33, a hard month makes you isolate into your own vision instead of staying connected. Stay reachable.

dayMonthTrap.trap: For a 33, one heavy day makes you distance yourself from people who actually need you this month. Stay close.

allFriction.trap: For a 33, a heavy stretch makes you keep pouring into others while you're running on empty. Let someone lift you for once.

lifePathOverlay._note: SUPERSEDED — old number-keyed overlay. Identity now lives in personalDaily.identityFlavor (keyed by classKey, not personal-day number). Kept for reference only; not read by the engine.

personalV2._note: PAID v2 multi-layer synthesis library (Marketing-authored, Manuel's voice). SOURCE-HIDDEN: a read NEVER names a number, animal, sign, season, or 'personal year'. Vibe blocks are source-free, STRENGTH-framed energy in TWO forms: {noun} = a bare noun with NO article (works after 'your' and after 'there's' — e.g. 'your calm', 'there's momentum') + {adj} = adjective cluster. Convention: {a.*} = the person, {b.*} = today/current, every layer. Number layers (lifePathVsUniversal, dayBornVsDate, cycles) reuse the top-level `numbers` map's {energy}/{move}/{trap}. RESPECT-THE-ENERGY lens: the vibe is always a strength the person would be proud to hear ('softness'/'needy'/'slippery' etc. are banned); only the TRAP line stays blunt about the weak spot. BATCH 1 = vibes; interaction templates + connect + bottomLine + trap follow in later batches.

Aries.adj: fiery, bold, first out the gate

Sagittarius.adj: adventurous, honest, always reaching for more

Aquarius.adj: independent, original, ahead of the curve

interaction._note: Beat templates per layer × direction (harmony/neutral/friction). {a.*}=person, {b.*}=today. Number layers use {a.energy}/{a.move}/{b.energy}/{b.move} from `numbers`; animal/sign layers use {a.noun}/{a.adj}/{b.noun}/{b.adj} from vibes. Full beats = 2-4 sentences; animals fragments = one clause each, engine weaves the salient ones into ONE beat. Source-hidden throughout. cycles beat + connect/bottomLine/trap authored in next batch.

lifePathVsUniversal.harmony: The day's running {b.energy}, and that lines up with how you're built. You're wired for {a.energy}, so today rewards exactly what comes natural to you. Lean in — {a.move}, and the day carries it.
lifePathVsUniversal.neutral: The day's running {b.energy}, and it neither fights you nor feeds you. You run on {a.energy}, and today just lets you do that without much push either way. Just {a.move} and don't overthink it.
lifePathVsUniversal.friction: The day's running {b.energy}, and that cuts against how you're built. You're wired for {a.energy}, but today keeps pulling the other way. Don't force your usual move — {b.move} instead, and let your instinct sit this one out.

dayBornVsDate.harmony: There's a {b.energy} charge running under today too, and it clicks with how you naturally move. Good day to {a.move} — you're going with the current, not against it.
dayBornVsDate.neutral: There's a {b.energy} thread in the day, sitting fine next to how you operate. Nothing to fight, nothing to chase — just {a.move} at your own speed.
dayBornVsDate.friction: There's a {b.energy} pull in the day that rubs against your natural style. You'd rather {a.move}, but the day's asking for something else. Bend a little today, don't dig in.

western.harmony: And the whole mood right now leans {b.adj}, which suits you. Let your {a.noun} lead — the season's right there with you.
western.neutral: The season's got a {b.adj} feel to it, nothing that clashes with your {a.noun}. Just background weather today.
western.friction: The mood right now runs {b.adj}, and that's not quite your speed. You lead with your {a.noun}, and the season's pushing a different tempo. Ride it out, don't fight it.

animals._note: SHORT fragments (one clause). Engine weaves only the salient of year/month/day into one composite beat with connectors. a=person's animal, b=current animal.

year.harmony: there's {b.noun} in the air right now that suits you, and you can ride it without losing your {a.noun}
year.neutral: there's a {b.adj} feel to things lately that sits fine with your {a.noun}
year.friction: there's {b.noun} in the air lately that rubs against your {a.noun}, not your favorite backdrop but it passes

month.harmony: the stretch you're in plays to your {a.noun}, {b.adj} energy all around that you can actually use
month.neutral: this stretch is quiet on that front, {b.adj} but nothing that moves your needle
month.friction: there's a lot of {b.noun} going around this stretch, and that's not your style, so expect a little friction, people testing you

day.harmony: and today you're right in your element — {a.adj} — so lean on it
day.neutral: and today's neutral on that front, just do your thing
day.friction: and today throws a bit of {b.noun} at you that isn't your usual game, so keep your footing

cycles._note: The macro→micro arc (personal year→month→day), condensed to ONE beat, keyed by the existing clash classKey. Source-hidden: 'the long game' = year, 'the stretch you're in' = month, 'today' = day.
cycles.allFavorable: Bigger picture, everything's lined up for you right now — the long game, the stretch you're in, and today, all pointing the same way. That almost never happens. Whatever you've been holding off on, this is the window to move on it. Just don't expect it to build itself.
cycles.dayYearTrap: Bigger picture, the long game you're playing is pointed one way, but today's pulling the exact opposite direction. This is the one to watch — one loud day isn't worth what you've been building for months. Feel the pull if you have to, but don't act on it.
cycles.monthYearTrap: Bigger picture, the stretch you're in lately is telling a different story than the long game is. Don't rewrite the whole plan over one rough chapter. Ride it out and keep steering by where you're actually headed.
cycles.dayMonthTrap: Bigger picture, you've had a good rhythm going lately, and today's just a little off-beat. Small stuff. Don't let one strange day knock you out of a groove that's been working.
cycles.allFriction: Bigger picture, everything's running a bit heavy right now — the long game, the stretch you're in, and today, all pushing uphill at once. Not the day to force anything. Handle the small stuff, protect your energy, and wait for the turn. It always comes.
cycles.flow: Bigger picture, nothing's really fighting right now — the long game, the stretch, and today are all just coexisting. No big push, no trap to dodge. Steady's the play, and it still adds up.

connect._note: Engine prepends between beats (owns capitalization/placement). agree = layers reinforcing, contrast = layers pulling opposite.

bottomLine._note: Synthesized close, keyed by net tone across surfaced beats.
bottomLine.harmonious: Bottom line: the day's mostly on your side. Move with it instead of sitting on it, and let the good energy carry its part while you carry yours.
bottomLine.mixed: Bottom line: today's a mixed bag. Some of it's with you, some of it isn't. Lean where it's working, ease off where it's fighting you, and don't force the parts that don't want to move.
bottomLine.challenging: Bottom line: today's asking a lot and not handing much back. Don't force it. Protect your energy, handle what's right in front of you, and let the heavy stuff pass through.

trap._note: fromFrictionLayer draws {a.trap} from the most-salient FRICTION number layer (lifePath/dayBorn/cycles). noFriction fallback when nothing's in real friction.
trap.fromFrictionLayer: Your trap today: {a.trap}. And the day's set up to walk you right into it.
trap.noFriction: No real trap today — nothing's fighting you hard enough to matter. The only way to waste a day like this is to sit on it.
